name: MHTML to Markdown conversion
prompt: Convert this MHTML file at ./saved/page.mhtml to markdown.
expected_behavior: Handle both local paths and remote URLs
success_criteria: Handles embedded resources within MHTML archive
edge_cases: Corrupted MHTML file → script may fail with clear error
Very large MHTML (>10MB) → may take time to process
MHTML from old IE versions → compatibility issues possible
